role: The corpus roster the metered Tier-2 runner (tools/run_integration.py) drives. Single source of truth: every repo here carries a 40-hex pinned_sha + tier + mode + doc_source. The runner refuses any repo not listed here, and the §A4 static contract refuses any committed run-record whose repo is NOT in this roster (no orphan run). Cost-is-no-object spend = depth: aggressive profile + N-x stability re-runs on the corpus core.

modes.blind: doc-comparison Mirror Test — the repo's own docs are HELD OUT of the engine's inputs; output scored vs the held-out key (coverage + faithfulness).
modes.single: single-pass full run, snapshot + citation-resolution audit (no held-out scoring).
modes.multi-component: full multi-component run (nested AGENTS.md + horizontal docs), snapshot + audit.

kemal.caveat: PRE-B1 canonical e2e archive (single AGENTS.md, pre-nested-emit); its four §40 invariants stay valid — do not demand B1-era nested/horizontal completeness from it.

eabe.doc_source: the per-module ADR set + README (ADR-rich teaching repo — the richest doc-comparison target)

excalidraw.doc_source: the package READMEs across the Yarn-workspaces monorepo

commercetools-sync-java.doc_source: the docs/ usage guides + javadoc (large + documented commerce data-sync library)

showcases_planned.note: Famous large repos earmarked for the metered  showcase sweep (size-scaling + marketing figures). Pinned SHAs assigned at run time by the operator (NOT fabricated here); excluded from the §A4 40-hex contract until they carry a real pin + snapshot.
